security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:* https://api.openai.com https://api.minimax.chat https://api.moonshot.cn https://api.siliconflow.cn https://api.anthropic.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
